The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: LALIBAZAR | Official Movie Trailer | Swastima Khadka, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira, Prashamsha
snippet.description:
LALIBAZAR - New Nepali Movie Official Trailer 2026 || Swastima Khadka, Bishal Devkota, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira Thapa, Prashamsa Subedi, Mukunda Kumar Shrestha, Abaya Baral, Asha Poudel, Govinda Sunar, Abha Aryal, Tara Sharma, Ramesh Badi, Nabaraj Regmi, Ghana Shyam Joshi, Pradip Dhakal, Mohan Panthi, JB Ruwali, Swarasoti Adhikari, Bhumika Tharu, Sagar Ghimire,Haroon Ali, Prem Pandey || Lalibazar New Nepali Full Movie 2026


Movie - LALIBAZAR
In Cinemas - Baisakh 18, 2083 ( 1st May 2026)

Story/Director: Yam Thapa
Screen Play/Dialouge: Pradip Bhattarai/Yam Thapa
Chief Asst. Director: Aaksh Ukheda
2nd Asst. Director: Jeeban Dhungel

Producers: Rabindra Singh Baniya, Max Dipesh Khatri

Art Director: Umesh Chaudhary

Post Production: Nepalese Hands

en.description:
#ranichatterjee #sanjanapandey #prashantsingh #aloksingh #reenarani #upwalibiharwali #trending #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuritrailer 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“ аӨҜаҘӮ . аӨӘаҘҖ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ№аӨҫаӨ° аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ  (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ  аӨҡаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаҘҖ  аӨёаӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨӘаӨҫаӨӮаӨЎаҘҮаӨҜ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ…аӨІаҘӢаӨ•  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ°аҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ  , аӨІаӨІаӨҝаӨӨ  аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ , аӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ•   - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ -  аӨҮаӨ®аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¶аӨ—аҘҒаӨЁ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨёаӨ®аҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҲаҘҷ аӨө аӨңаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҰ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° вҖ“ аӨҸаӨ® .аӨ•аҘҮ .аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ (аӨңаҘүаӨҜ )
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨҰаӨҫаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ (аӨёаӨӮаӨңаӨҜ аӨҰаӨҫаӨё )
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨІаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¶аӨЁ  аӨ°аҘүаӨҜ   
аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨІ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ  вҖ“  аӨ®аҘҒаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  ,аӨ•аӨ®аӨІаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ·аҘҚаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨ   аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№   
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ® аӨҰаҘҒаӨІаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ

аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаҘҒаӨІ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°
 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY MUSIC 
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ
B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ 
аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө

B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ

аӨ‘аӨ«аӨҝаӨё аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ вҖ“ аӨ•аӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҲаӨҜаӨҫ аӨқаӨҫ 

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё  -
 аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҹаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

 аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ·  аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ—  , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ°  аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨ°аӨҝаӨӨаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ№аӨ°аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨІ  аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ№ , аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨ¶  аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨөаҘҮаӨҰаҘҖ  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ«аҘҒаӨІ  аӨ—аҘҲаӨ•аӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎ

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards рҹ‘»

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sisterвҖҷs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaosвҖ”until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palaceвҖҷs centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sisterвҖҷs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaosвҖ”until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palaceвҖҷs centuries-old legend.

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.вҖӮвҖӮ

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they donвҖҷt, itвҖҷs GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Connect with #StreetFighterMovie online:
Website: https://www.streetfightermovie.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightermovie/

Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

hi.title: Nawaj Ansari - IRSHYA (Official Music Video)
hi.description:
аӨЁаӨөаӨҫаӨң аӨ…аӨӮаӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҲаӨӘаҘҖ 'аӨ—аӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ' аӨёаҘҮ 'аӨҮаӨ°аӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ' аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨЎаҘҖаӨ“аӨӘаҘҖ/аӨҸаӨЎаӨҝаӨҹ/аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ: аӨ°аҘҮаӨө аӨңаҘӮаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҰаҘӢаӨ¬аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨқаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҘаӨҫаҘӨ

аӨ°аҘҮаӨө аӨңаҘӮаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ«аҘүаӨІаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ: https://www.instagram.com/visualsbyrave

аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ№аҘҖ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨөаҘҖаӨЁаӨӨаӨ® аӨҸаӨІаҘҚаӨ¬аӨ® 'аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨҝаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҮаӨӮаӨЎаӨёаҘҮаӨҹ' аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁ аӨӯаҘӮаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PVMFdE3Cz5M&list=PLODwOLMhpdH_N4yNuHyxfnKMTGZ9QHxe1

These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces EarthвҖҷs mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

Con la realidad misma comenzando a fracturarse, la apariciГіn del Doctor Doom introduce una amenaza definida por la inteligencia, la precisiГіn y la ambiciГіn absoluta. El trГЎiler establece un tono mГЎs oscuro, mostrando destrucciГіn a gran escala, mundos que colapsan y hГ©roes luchando por mantener el control en un entorno cada vez mГЎs inestable. A medida que personajes nuevos y conocidos se unen, la lГӯnea entre la supervivencia y la derrota se vuelve mГЎs delgada que nunca.

La historia explora un futuro donde el poder por sГӯ solo podrГӯa no ser suficiente para detener lo que se avecina, ya que la influencia de Doom se extiende a travГ©s de la estrategia, la tecnologГӯa y la manipulaciГіn en mГәltiples realidades. Los Vengadores deben enfrentarse no solo a un poderoso enemigo, sino tambiГ©n a las consecuencias de un universo ya llevado al lГӯmite. Las alianzas se ponen a prueba, el liderazgo se ve desafiado y cada decisiГіn tiene repercusiones que trascienden una sola lГӯnea temporal. Con secuencias de acciГіn Г©picas, una gran carga emocional y un fuerte potencial para crossovers, Avengers: Doomsday se erige como uno de los proyectos mГЎs ambiciosos de Marvel, centrado en el colapso, la resistencia y la lucha por proteger el futuro del multiverso.

в—Ғ En nuestro canal, creamos mashups de trГЎileres. в–· Los mashups de trГЎileres, tambiГ©n conocidos como trГЎileres reeditados, se crean recopilando fragmentos de varias pelГӯculas y reeditГЎndolos para formar un trГЎiler completamente nuevo. Estos montajes suelen representar una pelГӯcula inexistente o cambiar el gГ©nero de una pelГӯcula ya existente. Como obras derivadas, segГәn lo define la Ley de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos (17 U.S.C. В§ 101), pueden estar protegidos contra reclamaciones de derechos de autor bajo la doctrina del uso legГӯtimo.

Los montajes de trГЎileres no solo son una forma de creatividad digital generada por el usuario, sino tambiГ©n una manera Гәnica de generar expectaciГіn por los prГіximos estrenos, complementando los trГЎileres oficiales. Mientras que los trГЎileres tradicionales anticipan la trama y generan expectaciГіn, los montajes creados por fans permiten al pГәblico darle su propio toque cinematogrГЎfico a las imГЎgenes existentes. Esta libertad creativa puede destacar a un actor en particular, enfatizar una trama especГӯfica o incluso transformar por completo el gГ©nero de la pelГӯcula.

Este video es una parodia. Debido a su naturaleza derivada y transformadora, estГЎ protegido por el uso legГӯtimo.

'аӨҸаӨөаҘҮаӨӮаӨңаӨ°аҘҚаӨё: аӨЎаҘӮаӨ®аҘҚаӨёаӨЎаҘҮ' аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨөаӨІ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨЎ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫаӨө аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨҶаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨ¬ аӨҸаӨ• аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨөаҘҲаӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаӨҝаӨ• аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒ-аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨ№аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨЎаҘҖаӨҜ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨҹ аӨӘаҘғаӨҘаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨ–аӨӨаӨ°аӨЁаӨҫаӨ• аӨІаӨЎаӨјаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ§аӨ•аҘҮаӨІ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨөаӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨөаӨҝаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҹаҘӮаӨҹаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ—аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨҒаӨҡаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ№аҘҖ, аӨЎаҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° аӨЎаҘӮаӨ® аӨ•аӨҫ аӨүаӨҰаӨҜ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҗаӨёаҘҮ аӨ–аӨӨаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаӨЁаҘҚаӨ® аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ¬аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝаӨ®аӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ, аӨёаӨҹаҘҖаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨёаҘҖаӨ® аӨ®аӨ№аӨӨаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨӯаӨҜаӨҫаӨөаӨ№ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҢаӨІ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҲаӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаӨҫаӨ¶, аӨўаӨ№аӨӨаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӨаҘҮаӨңаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫаӨөаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸ аӨ°аӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨёаӨӮаӨҳаӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҒаӨҸ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ-аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨЁаӨҸ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨ°аӨҰаӨҫаӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҶаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ…аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨө аӨ”аӨ° аӨ№аӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҖаӨҡ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ°аҘҮаӨ–аӨҫ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨӘаӨӨаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаӨҝаӨЁ аӨёаҘүаӨ«аӨјаҘҚаӨҹаӨөаҘҮаӨҜаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ: аӨҸаӨЎаҘӢаӨ¬ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨ®аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°, аӨҶаӨ«аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° аӨҮаӨ«аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨё, аӨ«аҘӢаӨҹаҘӢаӨ¶аҘүаӨӘ, аӨҸаӨЎаҘӢаӨ¬ аӨ‘аӨЎаӨҝаӨ¶аӨЁ, аӨ…аӨЁаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨІ аӨҮаӨӮаӨңаӨЁ 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

в—Ғ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨӘаӨ°, аӨ№аӨ® аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ®аҘҲаӨ¶аӨ…аӨӘ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ в–· аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ®аҘҲаӨ¶аӨ…аӨӘ, аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҹ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨҸаӨ• аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ®аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨөаӨҝаӨӯаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҹаҘҮаӨң аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҮаӨ•аӨҹаҘҚаӨ аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨӘаӨҫаӨҰаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ¬аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨІ аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҲаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ¶аӨ…аӨӘ аӨ…аӨ•аҘҚаӨёаӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨҗаӨёаҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ…аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨө аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҢаӨңаҘӮаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨёаӨӮаӨҜаҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаҘҚаӨҜ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аҘүаӨӘаҘҖаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨ® 17 аӨҜаҘӮ.аӨҸаӨё.аӨёаҘҖ. В§ 101 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӨаӨ№аӨӨ аӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨӯаӨҫаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаҘҒаӨӨаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨёаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҫаӨӮаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӨаӨ№аӨӨ аӨ•аҘүаӨӘаҘҖаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨҰаӨҫаӨөаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ®аҘҲаӨ¶аӨ…аӨӘ аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ-аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ¬аӨІаҘҚаӨ•аӨҝ аӨҶаӨ—аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҝаӨІаҘҖаӨңаӨј аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨүаӨӨаҘҚаӨёаӨҫаӨ№ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨЁаҘӮаӨ аӨҫ аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨ•аӨҫ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨ• аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨӮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аӨӮаӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫаӨЁаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҮаӨӨ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҡаӨҫаӨ° аӨүаӨӨаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨөаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аӨӮаӨёаӨ•-аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ¶аӨ…аӨӘ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аҘҢаӨңаҘӮаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҹаҘҮаӨң аӨӘаӨ° аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ…аӨӮаӨҰаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨ®аӨӨаӨҝ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨӨаӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨ…аӨӯаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨүаӨңаӨҫаӨ—аӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ° аӨңаӨјаҘӢаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨӘаҘҲаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаҘҒаӨӨаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨҫаӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨЈаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ, аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨүаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӨаӨ№аӨӨ аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ-аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨ§аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ!
аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ!

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU аёӯаё№ #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
аёһаёөаё— (аёҷаёІаёҷаёҙ аё«аёҙаёЈаёұаёҚаёҒаёӨаё©аёҺаёҙа№Ң) аёҠаёІаёўаё«аёҷаёёа№ҲаёЎаёңаё№а№үаёӯаёұаёҡа№ӮаёҠаё„аёӢаё¶а№ҲаёҮаёЎаёөа№ҖаёЁаё©аё§аёҙаёҚаёҚаёІаё“аёӣаёөаёЁаёІаёҲаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷаё•аёұаё§ аё—аёіа№ғаё«а№үаёӘаёұаёЎаёңаёұаёӘа№„аё”а№үаё–аё¶аёҮ а№Җаё«аёўаёІаёһаёҘаёұаёҮаёҮаёІаёҷаёӣаёЈаё°аё«аёҘаёІаё”аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёӯаёҒаёЎаёІаёҒаёҘаё·аёҷаёҒаёҙаёҷаёһаёҘаёұаёҮаёҠаёөаё§аёҙаё•аёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үаё„аёҷ аёҲаё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№үаёһаёҡаёҒаёұаёҡ аёҷаёҙаёЈаёұаёҷаё”аёЈа№Ң (аёӘаёҒаёІаёў аё§аёҮаёЁа№ҢаёЈаё§аёө) аёҠаёІаёўаё«аёҷаёёа№ҲаёЎаё—аёөа№ҲаёҷаёіаёһаёІа№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёӮаёІа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІа№„аёӣа№ғаёҷа№ӮаёҘаёҒа№Ғаё«а№ҲаёҮ вҖңаёӯаё№вҖқ аё—аёұа№үаёҮаёӘаёӯаёҮа№„аё”а№үаёҒаёҘаёІаёўа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё„аё№а№Ҳаё«аё№аёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°а№„аё”а№үаёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎаё—аёөаёЎа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаёҒаёұаёҷаёӣаёЈаёІаёҡа№Җаё«аёўаёІа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёұаё”а№Җаёӣа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аёЈа№үаёІаёў!
 
 аёҷаёҙаёЈаёұаёҷаё”аёЈа№Ң аёһаёөаё— а№ҒаёҘаё°аё—аёөаёЎаёӣаёЈаёІаёҡаёӣаёөаёЁаёІаёҲаёҲаё°аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаёЎаё·аёӯаёҒаёұаёҷаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷаёһа№үаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёӘаёЈаёЈаё„а№„аё”а№үа№„аё«аёЎ а№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёұаёЎаёһаёұаёҷаёҳа№ҢаёӮаёӯаёҮаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё„аё№а№ҲаёҲаё°аёңаё№аёҒаёһаёұаёҷаёҒаёұаёҷаё”а№үаё§аёўаёҲаёҙаё•аё§аёҙаёҚаёҚаёІаё“а№„аё”а№үаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎа№„аё”а№үа№ғаёҷ вҖңWU аёӯаё№вҖқ аё—аёёаёҒаё§аёұаёҷаёӯаёұаёҮаё„аёІаёЈ а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ 20:30 аёҷ. аё—аёІаёҮаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮ GMM25 аёЈаёұаёҡаёҠаёЎаёўа№үаёӯаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҒаёЈаёҒа№„аё”а№үаё—аёөа№Ҳ VIU а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ 21:30 аёҷ. а№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎ 5 аёһаёӨаё©аё аёІаё„аёЎаёҷаёөа№ү

аёЈаёІаёўаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҷаёұаёҒа№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ
аёӘаёҒаёІаёў аё§аёҮаёЁа№ҢаёЈаё§аёө аёҷаё—аёөаёҳаёЈ                 аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёҷаёҙаёЈаёұаёҷаё”аёЈа№Ң

snippet.title: KITAB (Official Music video) | Mr Dutt ft Vipin Foji | Tanu Rawat | New Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened.  join Mr Dutt  for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song KITAB
MAKE YOUR REELS : https://url-shortener.me/I440


Listen on : 
Spotify : https://url-shortener.me/I43P



AUDIO CREDITS:
SONG : KITAB 
SINGER : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI
LYRICS & COMPOSE : VARUN GARHWALA , MR DUTT
MUSIC & MISX MASTER : MR DUTT

 FEMALE LEAD : TANU RAWAT 
REEL PROMOTIONS: SHARP MEDIA

YT Promotion - BIGMedia 

Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer
1st Ad - Jass
Editor - cutsbynav
Colorist - Fateh Sidhu
Vfx - Gags 3D
Female lead - Tanu Rawat
Production Head = Kainth Production (Gagan)
Production ad = Ravi Birla
Himachal production- Sunny 
Makeup = Komal Makeover
Hair = Sunny Lakhanpal
Still = J singh
Spot Team - Ram and Team

Tanu Rawat Team 
Anjali Rawat and Team

Transport - Nijjar Group
Art - Karma 
Costume - Rajat Manchanda
Costume Ad - Neha and Fahem

lyrics : 
Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki 
Ya Tane Mumtaj Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai beth Gya Tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 

Ho Pucche na Tu Mere Te Ya Ashiq ka Haal Resham Te Jyada Hai Sunehre Tere Baal 
Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
CanвҖҷt lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu 
Maine Mai Ghanshyam Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To Pkka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki


#kitab #mrdutt

snippet.title: Battleground S2 - Official Trailer | Shikhar Dhawan, Khesari Lal, Fukra Insaan, Priyanka, Rahul
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents
Battleground Season 2 - Official Trailer

Starring: Shikhar Dhawan, Fukra Insaan (Abhishek Malhan), Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary, Rahul Chaudhari
Production House: Rusk Studios
Produced By: Rusk Media
Directed By: Monisha Jaisingh Vaid
Genre: Reality Show, Unscripted

@ThumsUpOfficial presents Battleground Season 2
Activewear Partner: @performaxactivewear 
Comfort Partner: @damensch7036 
Special Partner: @eekenlife3425 
Sunscreen Partner: @fixderma.skincare 
Associate Partner: Sheth Brothers

@shikhardhawan5942 @KhesariMusicWorld  @priyaankachaharchoudhary @FukraInsaan 

About Show: Battleground is here to find IndiaвҖҷs next fitness superstar, with cricket icon Shikhar Dhawan as the Super Selector. Over 5 weeks, 4 teams, and 1 house, 16 contestants will face off in intense physical challenges, earning вҖҳCreditsвҖҷ for themselves and their teams. Only 1 male and 1 female contestant will be crowned as the ultimate fitness champions. Leading the teams are dynamic personalities: Abhishek Malhan, Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary and Rahul Chaudhari bringing energy and strategy to the game. The contestants will live and train in a Bootcamp-style house, where their mental resilience, endurance, and teamwork will be tested every day. With daily episodes showcasing highlights, challenges, and behind-the-scenes moments, viewers will witness the drama, determination, and grit of each participant. As they push themselves to their limits, only the strongest will make it to the top. Who will become IndiaвҖҷs next fitness superstar? Tune in to find out!

About Amazon MX Player - 
Amazon MX Player is IndiaвҖҷs leading free, premium, ad-supported entertainment platform, offering the biggest collection of web series, movies, reality shows, and international content вҖ” all available to stream FREE. From blockbuster originals to trending new launches, Amazon MX Player brings you some of IndiaвҖҷs most loved shows like Ek Badnaam Aashram, Bhaukaal, Dharavi Bank, Indori Ishq, Roohaniyat, Chidiya Udd, Hunter, Hey Prabhu!, Battleground, Bindiya Ke Bahubali, Pyar Ka Professor and many more across thriller, romance, comedy, action, and drama genres for all ages. snippet.title: ST MAN - KALI KALI FT. YUNG 22 & BIG NORZZA ( OFFICAL MUSIC VIDEO )
snippet.description:
Nepal Hiphop Records Presents the official music video of Kali Kali by ST MAN featuring Yung 22 & Big Norzza.
Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.


Audio Credits :
вһҹ Performed By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
вһҹ Music Produced By - St Man
вһҹ Background scoring - St Man
вһҹ Lyrics By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
вһҹ Female singer - Somea Baraili
вһҹ Composed By - St Man & Yung 22
вһҹ Sarangi - Hemanta Kancha Rasaily
вһҹ Mix & Master By 8ugustus

вһҹ Director : Thomas GM 
вһҹ DOP : nexal thapa

Music - JAM8

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla

Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol DeвҖҰ
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol DeвҖҰ

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

I've been in love for a hundred years

My heart has been lost ever since

Your beauty was a symbol

Your every beat is you

Why should such a heart flutter

O cruel one, O cruel one

Your innocence is in my breath

You hide it, hide it...

Why should I express my love

It started with you
It ended with you

My love story was a fairy tale

You are the flame, so remember

I too am a paradise
O cruel one, O Zaalima..

snippet.title: Bangles (OfficialВ #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аӨЎаҘҖ
snippet.description:
|| рҹ•ү || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod

рҹҺӨ  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarРө ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mРөin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee: Song from Coachella 2026

Check Out the Coachella 2026 Rap/Hip-Hop, R&B Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg2x_V0qn2yoXAThIirv3AHI_R5Ngazct

вӯҗFollow Afterglow:

Spotify: https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
рҹ”ҙ Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

вӯҗFrench Montana:
https://www.instagram.com/frenchmontana/

Lyrics:

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out, Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' shit you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it (Skrrt)

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi (Ow)

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do (Oh)
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you, alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to me, 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose (Ooh)
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

Sabin Rai 
Binod Lama Tamang
Jeevan Lama
John Shrestha

Audio engineers
Stephen Tamang
Subash Gurung

Jitesh Shakya

Samir Shrestha

Like, have you ever been to Japan?
Or taken that Eurostar to France?

That IвҖҷd love it if you held my hand, goddamn
And then maybe we could make-makeout
Clothes off and fall to the ground
LetвҖҷs go steady
LetвҖҷs go out
And tell the whole damn world how

And stalked you on the internet
ItвҖҷs feminine intuition
вҖҳCuz I always had a vision of us standing like this

YouвҖҷre looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles

But kiss me and I might

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

snippet.title: Rama | Namit MalhotraвҖҷs Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit MalhotraвҖҷs Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 рҹҸ№
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit MalhotraвҖҷs Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

https://www.youtube.com/@UC56gTxNs4f9xZ7Pa2i5xNzg 
https://www.facebook.com/SonyMusicIndia

snippet.title: Kaavish - Intezaar
snippet.description:
Artist : Kaavish
Song : Intezaar

MUSIC
Lyrics : Jaffer Zaidi 
Bass : Waleed Attique

VIDEO
Director & Editor : Imam
Producer : Ovais Suhail 
Cinematographer : Babar Dahr
Art Director: Yamina Peerzada 
Focus Puller : Shakeel Shaukat 
Camera : Kap Camera Rental 
Lights & Crew : Popa Lights
Production Assistants : Muhammad Latif, Muhammad Aamir

Production Management : Alena Peerzada 
Artist management : Adil Awan

Lyrics:

ШӘЫҢШұЫ’ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Щ…ЫҢЪә
ШўШҙЩҗЫҢШ§Ъә ШіШ¬Ш§ШӨЪә ЪҜШ§
ЫҒЩҲЪҜШ§ ЫҢЫҒ Щ…ЩҗЩ„ЩҶ Ъ©ШЁЪҫЫҢ
Ш®ЩҲШҜ Ъ©ЩҲ ЫҢЫҒ ШЁШӘШ§ШӨЪә ЪҜШ§

ШӘЫҢШұЫ’ ЫҒЫҢ ЩҲЩҗШөШ§Щ„ ШіЫ’
ШҜЩ„ ШіЪ©ЩҲЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШҰЫ’ ЪҜШ§

ШҜШұШҜ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Ъ©Ш§
Ъ©ЫҢШ§ШҢ Ъ©ЩҗШіЫ’ ШЁШӘШ§ШӨЪә ЪҜШ§

ЫҒЩҲ Ъ©Ы’ ШӘЫҢШұЫ’ ШұЩҸЩҲШЁШұЩҲ 
ШӯШ§Щ„Щҗ ШҜЩ„ ШіЩҶШ§ШӨЪә ЪҜШ§

ШӘШЁ ШӘЩ„Ъ© ЫҢЫҒ ШҜЩ„ ШӘЫҢШұЫҢ
ЫҢШ§ШҜ Щ…ЫҢЪә ЫҒЫҢ ЪҜШ§ШҰЫ’ ЪҜШ§

ШӘЫҢШұЫ’ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Щ…ЫҢЪә 

ШЁЫ’ ЩҲШ¬ЫҒ ШіЫ’ Ш¬ЫҢЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЫҢЪә
Ш¬ЫҢЩҶЫ’ Ъ©ЫҢ ЩҲШ¬ЫҒ ШӘЩҲ ЫҒЫ’
ШіЩҸЩҲЩҶЫ’ ШіЩҸЩҲЩҶЫ’ ШўЩҶЪҜЩҶ Щ…ЫҢЪә
ЩҫЫҢШ§Шұ Ъ©ЫҢ ЫҒЩҺЩҲШ§ ШӘЩҲ ЫҒЫ’
ШӘЫҢШұЫ’ ШЁЩҗЩҶШ§ 
Щ…Шұ Ш¬Ш§ШӨЪә ЩҶЫҒ Щ…ЫҢЪә

ШӘЫҢШұЫ’ Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Щ…ЫҢЪә 

ЫҢЫҒ ШўЪҜ ЫҢЩҲЪә Ш¬ЩҺЩ„ШӘЫҢ ШұЫҒЫ’
ЫҢЫҒ ШҜЩ„ Щ…ЫҢШұШ§ШҢ Щ…Ш¬Ъҫ ШіЫ’ ЫҢЫҒ Ъ©ЫҒЫ’
Ъ©ЫҒ Щ…ЫҢЪә Ш¬ЩҺЩ„ Ш¬Ш§ШӨЪәШҢ ЩҫШ§ШӨЪә 
ЩҫЫҢШ§ШұШҢ Ш¬ЩҲ ЫҒЩҲ ЩҶЫҒ ЩҒЩҶШ§

Щ…ЫҢЪә Ш¬ЩҺЩ„ Ш¬Ш§ШӨЪәШҢ ЩҫШ§ШӨЪә 
ЩҫЫҢШ§ШұШҢ Ш¬ЩҲ ЫҒЩҲ ЩҶЫҒ ЩҒЩҶШ§

Puche Baatein Har Ghadi
Khwabo Se Ye Raatein Meri
Tujhse Kya Hai Mera Naata

Labb Kuch Aur Kahe
Dil Mera Shor Kare
Ban Gaya Tu Mera Ranjha

Khwabo Se Ye Raatein Meri
Tujhse Kya Hai Mera Naata

Labb Kuch Aur Kahe
Dil Mera Shor Kare
Ban Gaya Tu Mera Ranjha

Mere Sapno Ki Galiyon Mein
Tera Hi Ishq Rehta Hai
Kahin Bhi Jau Main Man Ye
Teri Hi Aur Behta Hai

Raanjhana Ve Tu Yaad Aa Ve
To Kho Jaun Bewajah
Meri Ankhon Se Door Jaave To
Lage Na Jiya

аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аӨ® аӨЁаӨҫаӨҮаӨ• аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ–аҘӮаӨ¬аӨёаҘӮаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨқаӨЈаӨҫ аӨөаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҒаӨ° аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аҘҒаӨ—аҘҚаӨ§ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҮаӨҸаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨҹаӨҝаӨ• аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ°, аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаӨҫаӨө аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҮаӨё аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҶаӨЁаӨӮаӨҰ аӨүаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡ аӨ—аҘҒаӨЈаӨөаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨІ аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨІаҘҮаӨӮ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҒаӨ•аҘӮаӨЁ аӨӯаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ§аҘҒаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЎаҘӮаӨ¬аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҸаӨ•аӨҰаӨ® аӨёаӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨ—аӨҫаӨҜаӨ•: аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘӢаӨ№аӨ® аӨЁаӨҫаӨҮаӨ•

аӨ°аӨҝаӨ« аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ®аӨҝаӨӮаӨ—: аӨҗаӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаӨҫаӨ аҘҖ

аӨёаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ®аҘҲаӨҹаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ°: аӨүаӨңаҘҚаӨңаҘҚаӨөаӨІ аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ

Lyrics
F - аӨёаҘҒаӨҳаӨ° аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҖаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨңаӨҫаӨөаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ® аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҖ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҖаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨөаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ®
аӨ°аӨүаӨҶ аӨІаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҹаҘҮ аӨёаҘӢаӨ°аӨ№ аӨҶаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ°аӨӨаӨҝ аӨӯаӨ° аӨЁаӨҮаӨ–аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨөаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ®  
M аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨІаӨҫ аӨӘ аӨ—аӨңаӨ¬аҘҮ аӨ®аҘӣаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ 
аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҮ..
аӨ•аӨ®аӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ.....

M - аӨ•аӨҫаӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҒ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨІаҘӮ аӨ§аӨЁ аӨ•аӨЁаӨ–аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ 
аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨӘ аӨІаҘҮаӨөаҘҮаӨҰ аӨҡаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨЁаӨ® аӨӨаӨЁаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ 
F - аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¬ 
аӨ®аӨ№аӨӮаӨ— аӨҮаӨЁаӨӯаӨҫаӨҲаӨҹ аӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¬ 
M - аӨҡаӨІаӨІаӨҫ аӨӘ аӨҰаӨ№аӨҝаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨөаҘҮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ
аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҮ..
аӨ•аӨ®аӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨЎаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨІаӨҫ аӨҸ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁ.....

M - аӨ№аӨөаҘҮ аӨёаҘӮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҸ аӨ§аӨЁаҘҖ аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ аӨёаӨҹаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ 
аӨ•аӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аӨ¬аҘӮ аӨӨ 
аӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ№аӨ® аӨӘаӨҹаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ 
F - аӨӘаӨ№аӨҝаӨ° аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫаӨҹаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ® аӨңаҘҖ 
аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨүаӨҰаҘҚаӨҳаӨҫаӨҹаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨІаӨ® аӨңаҘҖ

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol DeвҖҰ
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol DeвҖҰ

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

вҖңаӨ°аҘӢаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ—аӨ°аӨ®вҖқ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ–аҘҮаӨёаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө, аӨЁаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ®аӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨӘаҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨң аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ§аӨ®аӨҫаӨ•аӨҫ аӨӣаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҮаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҫ, аӨ«аҘҒаӨІ аӨ®аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҫаӨӮаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ…аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҖаӨӮ рҹҡҖ

аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨ… аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨ… аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аҘҖаӨІаҘҖ 
 аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• ...

аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҮ ...

 аӨ–аҘҒаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨөаӨ… аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨӣаҘҒаӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨ… аӨ—аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ

аӨ•аӨ°аӨ… аӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аҘҒ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨӯаӨҮаӨІ аӨңаҘӢаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ

Lyrics :-

аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаӨҝ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨҝ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨҳаӨ° аӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘӢ аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ№аҘҲаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҒаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨ°аҘҒаӨӘаӨІаҘҮ аӨҸ аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаӨҝ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаҘҲ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨІаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аӨңаҘҒаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҮаӨӣ аӨ•аҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨҡаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ
аӨ аӨҝаӨ• аӨӣ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ ?

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮ аӨ–аҘҲ 
аӨӘаӨҫаӨҒаӨҡ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨІаӨӯ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨІаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨЎ аӨӘаҘӢаӨҮаӨІ аӨ—аҘҲ 
аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ ... аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ..
аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҢаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ аӨ° аӨ–аҘҲ 

аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ№аӨІаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаҘҒаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘӢ аӨқаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ 
аӨ…аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮаӨ№аӨ°аҘҒ аӨёаӨҫаӨҲаӨЎ аӨІаӨҫаӨ— 

аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ - аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҜаӨӨаӨҫ 

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ

аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨІаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аӨңаҘҒаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҮаӨӣ аӨ•аҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨҡаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ

аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ ?

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘӮ аӨ–аҘҲ 
аӨӘаӨҫаӨҒаӨҡ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨІаӨӯ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨІаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨЎ аӨӘаҘӢаӨҮаӨІ аӨ—аҘҲ 
аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ ... аӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫаӨ№аӨҫ..
аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҢаӨІаӨҫаӨҸаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨӣ аӨ° аӨ–аҘҲ 

аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨҶаӨүаӨӣаҘҒ аӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ№аӨІаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаҘҒаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨҸаӨҒ аӨ®аҘҲаӨІаҘҮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘӢ аӨқаҘӢаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® 
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲ аӨёаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨӣаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҮаӨҹаҘҚаӨЁ аӨ®аӨЁ аӨІаӨҫаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢ аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨқаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ

аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨІаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аӨңаҘҒаӨ°, аӨ•аҘҮаӨӣ аӨ•аҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ№аӨІаҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨҡаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ
аӨ аӨҝаӨ• аӨӣ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҲ, аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘҖ

аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ аӨҶаӨҜаҘӢ, аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҳ

Lyrics:


(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Hai thoda besura par dil mein taal hai
Isko hum naachne se
tokein kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Nachchaan aaj main shukar mana ke
Sone yaar tonh nazrein mila ke
Mainu lor kise di koi na
saare jag di laaj bhula ke

Chal mood banake sufi
Thodi kar lein bewakoofi
Choolhe mein jaaye mitra
Duniya bhar ki masroofi

Pairon ko par lagne se rokeon kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4


ANTARA

Ve raanjha aag hai jitni idhar lagi
Tu bhi maan le dugni udhar lagi

Dono dil hi barabar jhulas gaye 
Pher.. jaan de kitni kidhar lagi

Ajj yaar de karke sadqe 
Maine pyale pyale gatke
Chal dekhein dil patri se
Aakhir kab tak na bhatke

Denge bhi ik dooje ko dhokhe kab talak..

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) Г—4

Behki jawaniyaan jaise barood hain
Dekhein uthte nahin hain 
Shole kab talak

snippet.title: Sean Kingston, Justin Bieber - Eenie Meenie (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Sean Kingston, Justin Bieber - Eenie Meenie (Lyrics)

рҹҢ¶пёҸLyrics:

[Intro: Sean Kingston]
Eenie-meenie-miney-mo
Catch a bad chick by her toe
If she holla, if, if
If she holla, let her go

[Verse 1: Sean Kingston]
She's indecisive, she can't decide
She keeps on lookin' from left to right
Girl, come a bit closer, look in my eyes
Searchin' is so wrong, I'm Mr. Right

[Pre-Chorus: Sean Kingston]
You seem like the type to love 'em and leave 'em
And disappear right after the song
So give me the night to show you, hold you
Don't leave me out here dancin' alone

[Chorus: Sean Kingston]
You can't make up your mind, mind, mind, mind, mind
Please don't waste my time, time, time, time, time
I'm not tryna rewind, 'wind, 'wind, 'wind, 'wind
I wish our hearts could come together as one
'Cause shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover, oh

[Verse 2: Justin Bieber]
Let me show you what you're missin', paradise
With me, you're winning, girl, you don't have to roll the dice
Tell me what you're really here for (Here for)
Them other guys? I can see right through ya

[Pre-Chorus: Justin Bieber]
You seem like the type to love 'em and leave 'em
And disappear right after the song
So give me the night to show you and hold you
Don't leave me out here dancin' alone

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Can't make up your mind, mind, mind, mind, mind
Please don't waste my time, time, time, time, time
Not trying to rewind, 'wind, 'wind, 'wind, 'wind
I wish our hearts could come together as one
'Cause shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover, woah, oh

[Bridge: Sean Kingston, Sean Kingston & Justin Bieber]
Eenie-meenie-miney-mo
Catch a bad chick by her toe
If she holla, if, if
If she holla, let her go (Here we go! Hey)
Eenie-meenie-miney-mo
Catch a bad chick by her toe
If she holla, holla, holla
Let-let her-her, lвҖ”

[Breakdown: Sean Kingston & Justin Bieber]
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover (Yeah)
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover (Yeah, yeah, yeah; Oh)
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover (Oh; Let's go!)
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo loвҖ” (Here we go! Hey)

[Chorus: Sean Kingston & Justin Bieber, Sean Kingston, Justin Bieber]
You can't make up your mind, mind, mind, mind, mind
Please don't waste my time, time, time, time, time (Woah)
I'm not tryna rewind, 'wind, 'wind, 'wind, 'wind (Ooh, yeah)
I wish our hearts could come together as one
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover (Eenie-meenie-miney-mo; Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover (Let's go!)
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover, woah, oh

snippet.title: They Played PUBG Mobile BLINDFOLDED & This Happened рҹҳӮ |
snippet.description:
рҹ”Ҙ What happens when pro players try to play blindfolded ? Chaos, laughter, and insane teamwork!

In this hilarious challenge featuring PUBG Mobile, we put two teams head-to-head:
рҹ‘ү *Nofear & Sky* рҹҶҡ *Sleepyy & Jiggle*

But hereвҖҷs the twist one player on each team is completely BLINDFOLDED рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« while their teammate guides them using only voice commands! Will communication be enough to secure the win, or will it turn into total disaster? рҹҳӮ

рҹ’Ҙ Expect :
* Funny moments & fails
* Pure teamwork (or complete confusion рҹҳҶ)

Big thanks to our sponsors: Red Bull, Infinix, and WorldLink for making this possible!

Edit Credit : https://www.instagram.com/biraj_rawal0?igsh=eWZwdWk3OGprNTVq&utm_source=qr

рҹ‘Ү Let us know in the comments:
Who do you think won this blindfold challenge?

рҹ”Ҙ What happens when pro players try to play blindfolded ? Chaos, laughter, and insane teamwork!

In this hilarious challenge featuring PUBG Mobile, we put two teams head-to-head:
рҹ‘ү *Nofear & Sky* рҹҶҡ *Sleepyy & Jiggle*

But hereвҖҷs the twist one player on each team is completely BLINDFOLDED рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« while their teammate guides them using only voice commands! Will communication be enough to secure the win, or will it turn into total disaster? рҹҳӮ

рҹ’Ҙ Expect :
* Funny moments & fails
* Pure teamwork (or complete confusion рҹҳҶ)

Big thanks to our sponsors: Red Bull, Infinix, and WorldLink for making this possible!

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Р©Рҫ СӮР°РәРө Roblox? ROBLOX вҖ” СҶРө РІС–СҖСӮСғР°Р»СҢРҪРёР№ РҫРҪР»Р°Р№РҪ-РјР°Р№СҒСӮРөСҖРҪСҸ СӮР° РјР°Р№СҒСӮРөСҖРҪСҸ, РҙРө РҙС–СӮРё СҖС–Р·РҪРҫРіРҫ РІС–РәСғ РјРҫР¶СғСӮСҢ РұРөР·РҝРөСҮРҪРҫ РІР·Р°С”РјРҫРҙС–СҸСӮРё, СӮРІРҫСҖРёСӮРё, СҖРҫР·РІР°Р¶Р°СӮРёСҒСҸ СӮР° РҪР°РІСҮР°СӮРёСҒСҸ. Р’С–РҪ СғРҪС–РәР°Р»СҢРҪРёР№ СӮРёРј, СүРҫ РҝСҖР°РәСӮРёСҮРҪРҫ РІСҒРө РІ ROBLOX СҖРҫР·СҖРҫРұР»РөРҪРҫ СӮР° РҝРҫРұСғРҙРҫРІР°РҪРҫ СҮР»РөРҪР°РјРё СҒРҝС–Р»СҢРҪРҫСӮРё. ROBLOX СҖРҫР·СҖРҫРұР»РөРҪРёР№ РҙР»СҸ РҙС–СӮРөР№ РІС–РәРҫРј РІС–Рҙ 13 РҙРҫ 18 СҖРҫРәС–РІ, Р°Р»Рө РІС–РҙРәСҖРёСӮРёР№ РҙР»СҸ Р»СҺРҙРөР№ РұСғРҙСҢ-СҸРәРҫРіРҫ РІС–РәСғ. РҡРҫР¶РөРҪ РіСҖР°РІРөСҶСҢ РҝРҫСҮРёРҪР°С” Р· РІРёРұРҫСҖСғ Р°РІР°СӮР°СҖР° СӮР° РҪР°РҙР°РҪРҪСҸ Р№РҫРјСғ С–РҙРөРҪСӮРёСҮРҪРҫСҒСӮС–. РҹРҫСӮС–Рј РІРҫРҪРё РјРҫР¶СғСӮСҢ РҙРҫСҒР»С–РҙР¶СғРІР°СӮРё ROBLOX вҖ” РІР·Р°С”РјРҫРҙС–СҸСӮРё Р· С–РҪСҲРёРјРё СҮРөСҖРөР· СҮР°СӮ, С–РіСҖРё Р°РұРҫ СҒРҝС–РІРҝСҖР°СҶСҺРІР°СӮРё РҪР°Рҙ СӮРІРҫСҖСҮРёРјРё РҝСҖРҫРөРәСӮР°РјРё. РҡРҫР¶РҪРҫРјСғ РіСҖР°РІСҶРөРІС– СӮР°РәРҫР¶ РҪР°РҙР°С”СӮСҢСҒСҸ РІР»Р°СҒРҪРёР№ СҲРјР°СӮРҫРә РҪРөР·Р°РұСғРҙРҫРІР°РҪРҫС— РҪРөСҖСғС…РҫРјРҫСҒСӮС– СҖР°Р·РҫРј С–Р· РІС–СҖСӮСғР°Р»СҢРҪРёРј РҪР°РұРҫСҖРҫРј С–РҪСҒСӮСҖСғРјРөРҪСӮС–РІ, Р·Р° РҙРҫРҝРҫРјРҫРіРҫСҺ СҸРәРҫРіРҫ РјРҫР¶РҪР° РҝСҖРҫРөРәСӮСғРІР°СӮРё СӮР° РұСғРҙСғРІР°СӮРё СүРҫ Р·Р°РІРіРҫРҙРҪРҫ вҖ” РұСғРҙСҢ СӮРҫ С…РјР°СҖРҫСҮРҫСҒ, СҸРәРёРј РјРҫР¶РҪР° РәРөСҖСғРІР°СӮРё, СҖРҫРұРҫСҮРёР№ РіРөР»С–РәРҫРҝСӮРөСҖ, РіС–РіР°РҪСӮСҒСҢРәРёР№ РҝС–РҪРұРҫР»СҢРҪРёР№ Р°РІСӮРҫРјР°СӮ, РұР°РіР°СӮРҫРәРҫСҖРёСҒСӮСғРІР°СҶСҢРәР° РіСҖР° В«Р—Р°С…РҫРҝР»РөРҪРҪСҸ РҝСҖР°РҝРҫСҖР°В» СҮРё СҸРәРөСҒСҢ С–РҪСҲРө, СүРө РҪРө РІРёРіР°РҙР°РҪРө СӮРІРҫСҖС–РҪРҪСҸ. РҰСҸ РҝРөСҖСҲР° РҙС–Р»СҸРҪРәР° РІС–СҖСӮСғР°Р»СҢРҪРҫС— Р·РөРјР»С– РұРөР·РәРҫСҲСӮРҫРІРҪР°. Р‘РөСҖСғСҮРё СғСҮР°СҒСӮСҢ СӮР° РұСғРҙСғСҺСҮРё РәСҖСғСӮС– СҖРөСҮС–, СғСҮР°СҒРҪРёРәРё ROBLOX РјРҫР¶СғСӮСҢ Р·Р°СҖРҫРұР»СҸСӮРё СҒРҝРөСҶС–Р°Р»СҢРҪС– Р·РҪР°СҮРәРё, Р° СӮР°РәРҫР¶ РҙРҫР»Р°СҖРё ROBLOX (В«RobuxВ»). РЈ СҒРІРҫСҺ СҮРөСҖРіСғ, РІРҫРҪРё РјРҫР¶СғСӮСҢ РәСғРҝСғРІР°СӮРё РҫРҙСҸРі СӮР° Р°РәСҒРөСҒСғР°СҖРё РҙР»СҸ Р°РІР°СӮР°СҖС–РІ РІ РҫРҪР»Р°Р№РҪ-РәР°СӮР°Р»РҫР·С–, Р° СӮР°РәРҫР¶ РҝСҖРөРјС–Р°Р»СҢРҪС– РұСғРҙС–РІРөР»СҢРҪС– РјР°СӮРөСҖС–Р°Р»Рё, С–РҪСӮРөСҖР°РәСӮРёРІРҪС– РәРҫРјРҝРҫРҪРөРҪСӮРё СӮР° СҖРҫРұРҫСҮС– РјРөС…Р°РҪС–Р·РјРё.

аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ? аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨё аӨҸаӨ• аӨ‘аӨЁаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаҘҒаӨ…аӨІ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨЎ аӨ”аӨ° аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аӨ¶аҘүаӨӘ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨүаӨ®аҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҡаҘҚаӨҡаҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ•-аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаӨҡаҘҖаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ®аӨңаӨјаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҖаӨ– аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ ROBLOX аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨёаӨҝаӨҜаӨӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҮаӨё аӨӘаӨ° аӨІаӨ—аӨӯаӨ— аӨёаӨ¬ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨёаӨ®аҘҒаӨҰаӨҫаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҰаӨёаҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ ROBLOX 13 аӨёаҘҮ 18 аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ· аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҶаӨҜаҘҒ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘӢаӨ—аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨүаӨ®аҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘӢаӨ—аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ–аҘҒаӨІаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаҘҮаӨ• аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ° аӨҡаҘҒаӨЁаӨ•аӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨёаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨӘаӨ№аӨҡаӨҫаӨЁ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ°аҘҒаӨҶаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨөаҘҮ ROBLOX аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘӢаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ - аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҡаҘҲаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ, аӨ—аҘҮаӨ® аӨ–аҘҮаӨІаӨ•аӨ° аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨңаӨЁаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨёаӨ№аӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаӨҡаҘҖаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаҘҮаӨ• аӨ–аӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨөаӨҝаӨ•аӨёаӨҝаӨӨ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаҘҒаӨ…аӨІ аӨңаӨјаӨ®аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҹаҘҒаӨ•аӨЎаӨјаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҸаӨ• аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаҘҒаӨ…аӨІ аӨҹаҘӮаӨІаӨ¬аҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨё аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨёаҘҮ аӨөаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨЈ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ - аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аҘҮ аӨөаӨ№ аӨҡаӨІаӨЁаҘҮ-аӨ«аӨҝаӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ—аӨ—аӨЁаӨҡаҘҒаӨӮаӨ¬аҘҖ аӨҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨҸаӨ• аӨҡаӨІаӨӨаӨҫ-аӨ«аӨҝаӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҮаӨІаҘҖаӨ•аҘүаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨҸаӨ• аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨӘаӨҝаӨЁаӨ¬аҘүаӨІ аӨ®аӨ¶аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨҸаӨ• аӨ®аӨІаҘҚаӨҹаҘҖаӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨҜаӨ° "аӨ•аҘҲаӨӘаҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨҰ аӨ«аҘҚаӨІаҘҲаӨ—" аӨ—аҘҮаӨ® аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ, аӨ…аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ•аӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫаҘӨ аӨҮаӨё аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаҘҒаӨ…аӨІ аӨңаӨјаӨ®аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҹаҘҒаӨ•аӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ•аҘҖаӨ®аӨӨ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁаӨҰаӨҫаӨ° аӨҡаҘҖаӨңаӨјаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨ•аӨ°, ROBLOX аӨёаӨҰаӨёаҘҚаӨҜ аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аҘҮаӨ· аӨ¬аҘҲаӨң аӨ”аӨ° ROBLOX аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° ("Robux") аӨ•аӨ®аӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨөаҘҮ аӨ‘аӨЁаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҲаӨҹаӨІаҘүаӨ— аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҮаӨёаӨ°аҘҖаӨңаӨј аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ-аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨ®аӨҝаӨҜаӨ® аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨЈ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ, аӨҮаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аҘҲаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаҘӢаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ•аҘҮаӨЁаӨҝаӨңаӨјаҘҚаӨ® аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
